name: Billsby
description: Billsby — Subscription billing platform with dunning management, proration, checkout widgets, and revenue retention tools.

seo.title: Billsby — Subscription Billing
seo.meta_description: Billsby: Billsby — Subscription billing platform with dunning management, proration, checkout widgets, and revenue retention tools.

when_to_use: Dunning management and failed payment recovery for subscription SaaS
Proration calculation for mid-cycle plan changes in billing engine
Embeddable checkout widget for subscription sign-up on any website
Revenue retention tooling for reducing involuntary churn

pros: Drop-in checkout widgets cut integration time significantly
Strong dunning and retention tools recover failed payments
Flexible plan, addon, and coupon modeling out of the box
Transparent flat-rate pricing with no hidden transaction fees
cons: Not a Merchant of Record; you handle global tax yourself
Reporting depth lags behind ChartMogul or ProfitWell
Webhook reliability can be spotty under high load
Fewer native integrations than Chargebee or Recurly
review.verdict: Solid mid-market subscription engine with excellent retention tooling, but weak on analytics and global tax handling.
review.best_for: SMB and mid-market SaaS wanting quick checkout and dunning without building billing from scratch.
review.not_for: Teams needing Merchant of Record coverage, enterprise CPQ, or deep revenue analytics.
